description: Minimal harmonic region model for Mudpuppy (Spacetime v2.0beta). TFT-only, triadic-time aligned, no SET/S-N-R/FFF. Demonstrates harmonic uplift and nested region stability.

harmonic_region.notes: Harmonic uplift region; supports curvature modulation.

example_usage.scenario: Constructing a harmonic region from a classical base region
steps: Use dimensional_nest to activate L2 harmonic region.
Apply harmonic_lift to align with D9.
Use triadic_extension to activate L3 triadic region.
example_usage.expected_outcome: A stable harmonic region aligned with triadic-time layers using TFT-only constructs.
